final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing panoramic illustration of the 元宵 (Lantern Festival) in Tang Dynasty 长安城 (Chang'an).

Style/medium: needs a "工笔重彩" (fine-line heavy-color painting) aesthetic rendered as a horizontal handscroll — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a wide horizontal scroll (长卷) composition with a sweeping panoramic view of the city
Subject: must include thousands of lanterns (万盏花灯) illuminating the night sky, festival crowds, and Tang Dynasty 长安城 architecture
Scene/backdrop: must include 长安城 at night during 元宵 festival — grand city gates, lantern-lined avenues, and celebratory atmosphere
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, luminous night atmosphere lit by massed lantern glow — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a rich, jewel-toned "重彩" direction — exact pigment choices and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a silk or fine paper handscroll surface treatment — exact texture weight is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
